name: Unusual Child Process from Different Processes
notes:
This rule detects unusual child process from different processes.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Semanur Guneysu @semanurtg, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Abused Debug Privilege by Arbitrary Parent Processes
SIGMA Description: Detection of unusual child processes by different system processes


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% route %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% add %' AQL filter query

when the event matches ( LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") in ('winlogon.exe', 'services.exe', 'lsass.exe', 'csrss.exe', 'smss.exe', 'wininit.exe', 'spoolsv.exe', 'searchindexer.exe') AND LOWER(Username) in ('authori', 'autori') ) AND ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") in ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.exe', 'cmd.exe') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.dll', 'cmd.exe') ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Unusual Child Process from Different Processes on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% route %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% add %' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") in ('winlogon.exe', 'services.exe', 'lsass.exe', 'csrss.exe', 'smss.exe', 'wininit.exe', 'spoolsv.exe', 'searchindexer.exe') 	AND LOWER(Username) in ('authori', 'autori') ) AND  ( 	LOWER("Process Full Full Name") in ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.exe', 'cmd.exe') 	OR LOWER("Filename") in ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.dll', 'cmd.exe') ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Unusual Child Process from Different Processes
Event description: Detects unusual child process from different processes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
